raw_address:
Bayside Anglican Church Hall
Pitt-Owen Street, Arncliffe, NSW
details:
Thursday Group Matchplay

5:45pm – Rego & free play.

6:30pm - Comp begins.

7/5/3/1 - 7/4/1 scoring

Qualifying: 4 rounds x 2 games / round

Semi-final: Top 8 (or top 4 if less than 16 players). 1 game semi final. Top 2 players from each group proceed to the Final. Machines randomly selected by Matchplay

Final: 4 players will play 1 sudden death final, highest seeded qualifier(s) pick machine

Cost: $25 cash

Winner trophy. Prizes for final 4

Note: # of Rounds, Semifinal & Final may be amended - time pending
